landing.description: Unlock the power of artificial intelligence to make informed crop decisions. Our platform analyzes soil conditions, climate data, and agricultural patterns to deliver personalized recommendations for maximum yield and sustainability.
landing.featureSmartDesc: AI-powered analysis for optimal crop selection
landing.featureSustainDesc: Maximize yield while protecting the environment
landing.finalCtaText: Join thousands of farmers making smarter decisions with AI

recommender.title: 🌾 Crop Recommendation
recommender.subtitle: Enter your soil and climate data to get AI-powered crop recommendations
recommender.sectionSubtitle: Provide soil and climate information to get personalized crop recommendations

results.title: 🌾 Top Recommended Crops
results.emptyMessage: You need to fill in the crop prediction form on the Home page to see results.
results.comparisonSubtitle: Quickly see how each recommended crop differs in cost, water need, duration, and season so you can pick the one that fits your farm best.

cropCard.confidenceHint: Higher bar = better match for your soil & climate

market.title: Live Commodity Market
market.subtitle: Real-time data and trends for major crops in India

marketTrend.adviceGood: Good time to sell your produce at higher prices
marketTrend.adviceCaution: Prices are falling, consider storing for better prices
marketTrend.adviceNeutral: Prices are stable, market is balanced

chatbot.title: AgriGuide Assistant
chatbot.greeting: Hi! I'm AgriGuide's assistant. Ask me anything about crops, soil, fertilizers, or how to use this app.
chatbot.placeholder: Ask about crops, soil, or this app...

about.title: AgriGuide
about.subtitle: AI-Assisted Farming Decisions for Better Outcomes
about.description: AgriGuide helps farmers and agri learners turn soil, climate, and crop intelligence into practical action. From selecting crops to reviewing market direction, the platform is built to support confident farm planning.
about.whatIsDesc: AgriGuide is a smart agriculture assistant that combines machine learning predictions with field-oriented crop information. The goal is simple: make complex farm data easier to understand so users can take timely, informed decisions.
about.cropCoverageDesc: The recommendation model and crop intelligence layer cover 22+ crops commonly grown across India, including:
about.missionQuote: "Make reliable agricultural guidance accessible so every farming decision can be smarter, safer, and more sustainable."
about.teamVisionDesc: AgriGuide is being developed as a practical agri-tech project that blends software engineering, machine learning, and agriculture-focused thinking. The roadmap is centered on real usability, continuous improvement, and measurable farm impact.
about.contactDesc: Questions, feedback, or collaboration ideas are always welcome.
